explanatoryNotes: Small-dollar donors contributed 53% of reported private fundraising across 350 contributions.
9 donors gave at the legal maximum, totaling $9,450.
Committees, unions, or other non-individual donors made up 39% of reported private fundraising.
A noticeable share of reported private fundraising, 17%, came from outside New York City.
Among reported private contributions, education stands out as one of the strongest donor patterns.
